extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Visual transcription from sliced SoA PDF (full-protocol document pages 53-54; page numbers below refer to the printed 'Document Page' numbers). Physical column 1 = activity labels; physical column 2 is a second label sub-column holding the header row names 'VISIT' and 'WEEK' - it is treated as part of the label area (property_name_source column 2) and excluded from schedule_grid. Data columns are physical columns 3-10. The empty column between Visit 5 and Visit 7 (column 8) is transcribed literally as an empty column - no visit number, no week, no marks. WEEK value '-.3' for Visit 2 transcribed literally. The three-line row 'Study drug record / Medications dispensed / Medications returned' is one physical row with a single set of marks and is kept as one activity. Trailing colon on 'Laboratory (Chem/Hemat):' kept in cell_text, dropped from clean name.

table_metadata.table_title: Schedule of Events for Protocol H2Q-MC-LZZT(c)
table_metadata.table_purpose: Main schedule: screening (Visits 1-2) and first treatment-period visits (Visits 3-8, Weeks -2 to 8)
table_metadata.notes: Protocol Attachment LZZT.1. Page numbers are the printed 'Document Page' numbers of the full protocol PDF.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Visit numbers (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, blank, 7, 8); one physical column between Visit 5 and Visit 7 has an empty header (no Visit 6 column value printed) - transcribed literally as an empty column. Classified as 'visit': row of visit identifiers.
Study week numbers (-2, -.3, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8). Classified as 'week': numeric week values aligned to visits.

annotations.annotation_text: Xa = Performed at this visit if patient is an insulin-dependent diabetic.
Xb = Performed at this visit and via telephone interview 2 weeks following this visit.

P = Practice only - It is recommended that a sampling of the CIBIC+, ADAS-Cog, DAD, and NPI-X be administered at Visit 1. Data from this sampling would not be considered as study data and would not be collected.
